0.0.1.description: This release includes the first build of the Hot Lava Archipelago World file. Using the world requires the installation of the Archipelago plugin for Hot Lava which can be found here: https://thunderstore.io/c/hot-lava/p/Bongo9911/HotLavaArchipelago/
0.0.1.title: Hot Lava AP World v0.0.1
